problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: Combining Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
